# QA Plan: Hero Database Epic (Sprint 2 — Foundation greenfield with one head-start)
**Date**: 2026-05-01
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 5 stories across 1 system (Foundation-layer module + 6 query API + JSON roster)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GDScript) — GdUnit4 v6.1.2
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-2.md` (S2-04 epic implementation)
**Epic File**: `production/epics/hero-database/EPIC.md`
**Governing ADR**: ADR-0007 (Accepted 2026-04-30) + ADR-0001 (non-emitter) + ADR-0006 (forward-compat) + ADR-0009 (Unit Role 1:1 enum alignment)
**Implementation order**: 001 → 002 → 003 → {004, 005 parallel}

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| 001 Module skeleton + 6 query API | Logic | New `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_test.gd` (≥6 skeleton tests) + ≥506 baseline regression | None (post-pass smoke optional if baseline shifts) |
| 002 Validation pipeline FATAL | Integration | New `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_validation_test.gd` (~15 boundary-value tests) | None |
| 003 MVP roster + happy-path integration | Integration | New `tests/integration/foundation/hero_database_mvp_roster_test.gd` (~8 tests against real `heroes.json`) | Authoring smoke if FATAL trips during iteration |
| 004 WARNING tier + R-1 mutation regression | Logic | New `hero_database_warning_tier_test.gd` (5 tests) + new `hero_database_consumer_mutation_test.gd` (1+ R-1 regression) | None (forbidden_pattern grep verified inline) |
| 005 Perf baseline + non-emitter lint + Polish-tier scaffold | Config/Data | New `hero_database_perf_test.gd` (4-5 perf tests) + 2 new bash lints in CI | Smoke evidence doc with negative-path verification + TD-### register entries |

**Aggregate test delta**: ~30-40 new tests across 4 new test files; baseline 506 → ~540-545 expected post-epic. ≤1 carried orthogonal failure preserved (`test_hero_data_doc_comment_contains_required_strings`).

---

## Automated Tests Required

### Story 001 — Module skeleton (Logic)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_test.gd` (NEW)
**What to test** (TR-001, TR-003, TR-004, TR-014):
- Module form (AC-1): `@abstract class_name HeroDatabase extends RefCounted`; zero `_init`/`_ready`/`_process`/instance fields/signals/subscriptions
- Static vars (AC-2): `_heroes_loaded: bool = false` + `_heroes: Dictionary[StringName, HeroData] = {}` (Godot 4.4+ typed Dictionary)
- Lazy-init contract (AC-3): `_load_heroes()` invoked on first call; `_heroes_loaded` flips to true; subsequent calls skip re-read
- 6-method API signatures (AC-4): exact return types per ADR-0007 §4 with G-2 typed-array discipline
- Read-only source comments (AC-5): `# RETURNS SHARED REFERENCE` on each query method
- Test isolation (AC-6): `before_test()` resets `_heroes_loaded = false` AND `_heroes = {}` per G-15
- Skeleton coverage (AC-7): minimum 6 tests, one per query method + lazy-init

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `get_hero(&"unknown")` returns null + `push_error` (NOT degrade-with-default)
- `get_all_hero_ids()` return type is `Array[StringName]` not bare `Array` (G-2 typing demotion guard)
- FileAccess returns empty string → `push_error` + `_heroes_loaded` stays false; next call retries (acceptable MVP — story 002 may strengthen)
- `before_each()` (GdUnit3 idiom) is a violation — must be `before_test()` per v6.1.2 lifecycle

**Estimated test count**: 6-8 new (one per query method + lazy-init contract + boundary; ~506 → ~512 baseline)

---

### Story 002 — Validation pipeline FATAL (Integration)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_validation_test.gd` (NEW)
**What to test** (TR-006, TR-007, TR-008, TR-009):
- AC-1 (TR-006 / GDD AC-01): hero_id regex FATAL load-reject — `WEI_001_zhang_liao` (uppercase) / `wei_1_zhang_liao` (1-digit) / `wei_001_` (empty slug) reject the entire load; `wei_007_zhang_liao` accepted
- AC-2 (TR-007 / GDD AC-02): core stat range per-record FATAL — boundaries 1 + 100 accepted; 0 + 101 dropped (×4 fields: might/intellect/command/agility)
- AC-3 (TR-007 / GDD AC-03): derived seed range — boundaries 1 + 100 accepted; 0 + 101 dropped (×2 fields: base_hp_seed / base_initiative_seed)
- AC-4 (TR-007 / GDD AC-04): move_range — 2 + 6 accepted; 1 + 7 dropped
- AC-5 (TR-007 / GDD AC-05): growth rate boundaries — 0.5 + 2.0 accepted; 0.4 + 2.1 dropped (×4 fields: growth_might/intellect/command/agility)
- AC-6 (TR-009 / GDD AC-07 + AC-13): skill parallel array integrity — length 3 vs length 2 dropped; both length 0 accepted (per EC-3)
- AC-7 (TR-008 / GDD AC-12): EC-1 duplicate hero_id load-reject FATAL — entire load cleared, NOT just the second
- AC-8 (severity ordering): mixed-error fixture proves regex/duplicate gate full-load reject; range/skill gate per-record reject only
- AC-9 (test isolation): `before_test()` resets BOTH state vars per G-15

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Floating-point boundary 0.4999... — accept GDScript native float comparison; do not introduce epsilon
- `push_error` message format includes hero_id + field/value/range (AC structured-message contract)
- Duplicate-key fixture: real Dictionary CANNOT have duplicate keys — use list-of-pairs fixture or pre-cache injection seam
- Mixed-error fixture (1 invalid hero_id + 1 valid + 1 invalid stat): only AC-1 trips; without regex violation, only the invalid stat record drops (severity-ordering proof)

**Estimated test count**: ~15 new boundary-value tests (~512 → ~527 baseline)

---

### Story 003 — MVP roster + happy-path integration (Integration)
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/foundation/hero_database_mvp_roster_test.gd` (NEW)
**Asset path**: `assets/data/heroes/heroes.json` (NEW)
**What to test** (TR-002, TR-012):
- AC-1..AC-3 (file structure + faction coverage): valid JSON Dictionary; 8-10 records; covers SHU=0, WEI=1, WU=2, QUNXIONG=3 (NEUTRAL=4 optional)
- AC-4 (is_available_mvp = true): all records flagged true
- AC-5 (TR-002 26-field shape): every record has exactly 26 fields per ADR-0007 §2 — no missing, no extras
- AC-6 (TR-012 default_class int): every `default_class` is int in [0, 5]; NOT typed enum reference
- AC-7 (validation pipeline PASS): real-file load against story-002's pipeline yields zero `push_error`; `_heroes.size() == record_count`
- AC-8 (GDD AC-06 relationship round-trip): ≥2 records have non-empty relationships with all 4 fields (`hero_b_id` + `relation_type` + `effect_tag` + `is_symmetric`); `get_relationships()` returns same shape
- AC-9 (GDD AC-15 happy-path): `get_hero(&"shu_001_liu_bei")` returns canonical record; `get_mvp_roster().size() == record_count`; `get_heroes_by_faction(0).size() ≥ 1`; `get_all_hero_ids()` returns typed `Array[StringName]`
- AC-10 (integration test passes): suite count ≥ 8

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `faction > 4` invalid (no enum value defined)
- `default_class` JSON-stored as float (`4.0`) is a CR-4 convention violation
- Typo in field name surfaces as missing-key assertion failure or `push_error` from `_build_hero_data`
- Typo in relationship key (e.g. `is_symetric`) trips assertion; record's other fields still load (relationships are best-effort per WARNING-tier story 004)

**Estimated test count**: ~8 new integration tests (~527 → ~535 baseline)

---

### Story 004 — WARNING tier + R-1 mutation regression (Logic)
**Test file paths** (2 NEW files):
1. `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_warning_tier_test.gd` — covers AC-1..AC-5 (5 tests)
2. `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_consumer_mutation_test.gd` — covers AC-6 (1+ R-1 regression test)

**What to test** (TR-005, TR-010):
- AC-1 (EC-4 self-reference): `hero_b_id == hero_id` → entry dropped; record loads normally; `push_warning` cites self-ref + hero_id
- AC-2 (EC-5 orphan FK): `hero_b_id == "qun_099_fictional"` (not in `_heroes` post-load) → entry dropped; record normal; warning cites unresolved id
- AC-3 (EC-6 asymmetric conflict): A→B RIVAL `is_symmetric=true` + B→A SWORN_BROTHER `is_symmetric=true` → BOTH entries kept (Hero DB does NOT adjudicate); warning cites pair
- AC-4 (load-order independence): pass-3 runs against post-pass-2 state; forward-ref + back-ref both work
- AC-5 (record load resilience): 3-record fixture with EC-4+EC-5+EC-6 simultaneously → all 3 records loaded; only specific entries dropped/flagged; ≥3 push_warning emissions
- AC-6 (R-1 mitigation regression): `test_get_hero_returns_shared_reference_mutation_is_visible_convention_is_sole_defense` — mutating `hero1.stat_might = 99` IS visible on next `get_hero` call; test PASSING is the desired outcome (proves convention-only enforcement)
- AC-7 (forbidden_pattern verified): `docs/registry/architecture.yaml` contains `hero_data_consumer_mutation` AND `hero_database_signal_emission`
- AC-8 (typed-array return preserved): `get_relationships()` returns `Array[Dictionary]` post-WARNING-filter (no demotion)
- AC-9 (test isolation): all new tests reset both state vars per G-15

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Orphan to a record that EXISTS in fixture but was DROPPED by pass-2 FATAL: also drops as orphan (intentional — pass 3 runs against post-pass-2 state)
- `is_symmetric=false` on either side of EC-6 conflict: detection skips (one-way relationships valid by design)
- R-1 test failure semantics: if assertion fails, ADR-0007 §5 was changed without updating test — escalate (`override_failure_message` guides maintainers)
- Forbidden_pattern missing: scope expands to same-patch fix citing ADR-0007 §7 + §Migration Plan §6

**Estimated test count**: ~6 new (5 WARNING-tier + 1+ R-1 regression; ~535 → ~541 baseline)

---

### Story 005 — Perf baseline + lints + Polish-tier scaffold (Config/Data)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/hero_database_perf_test.gd` (NEW)
**Lint script paths** (2 NEW bash files):
1. `tools/ci/lint_hero_database_no_signal_emission.sh` — non-emitter + G-15 isolation grep gate
2. `tools/ci/lint_hero_database_validation.sh` — Polish-tier scaffold (exit 0 stub)

**CI integration**: `.github/workflows/tests.yml` +3-5 lines for non-emitter lint step (Polish-tier scaffold NOT wired)

**What to test** (TR-011, TR-013, TR-015):
- AC-1 (perf baseline) — headless permissive gates (×3-5 over budget for noise):
  - `get_hero(&"<known_id>")` × 1000 iterations: median <5µs (×5 over 1µs budget)
  - `_load_heroes()` cold-start on 10-hero fixture: <50ms (×3-5 over 5-15ms budget)
  - `get_mvp_roster()` × 100 iterations: <50µs (×5 over 10µs budget)
  - `get_heroes_by_faction(0)` × 100 iterations: <250µs (×5 over 50µs budget)
- AC-2 (non-emitter lint): `grep -nE '(signal\s|connect\(|emit_signal\()' src/foundation/hero_database.gd src/foundation/hero_data.gd` exits 0 on zero matches, exit 1 on any
- AC-3 (G-15 isolation grep gate): `grep -L '_heroes_loaded = false' tests/unit/foundation/hero_database*.gd tests/integration/foundation/hero_database*.gd` returns empty
- AC-4 (Polish-tier scaffold): exit 0 + prints "Polish-deferred" message + cites ADR-0007 §11 + N2 (5-precedent pattern)
- AC-5 (CI wiring): step exists between existing lint and gdunit4-job per balance-data story-003/004 precedent
- AC-7 + AC-8 (TD entries): 2 new entries in `docs/tech-debt-register.md` — Polish-tier validation lint + 100-hero benchmark — with reactivation triggers + cross-refs + estimates

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Negative-path verification (per TG-2 / balance-data story-004 precedent): inject literal `signal test_signal` line, re-run lint, expect exit 1; remove, expect exit 0
- Negative-path G-15: temporarily remove `_heroes_loaded = false` from one test file, re-run, expect exit 1
- Perf test failure on first run = triage CI runner load, NOT immediate code change (re-run before flagging)
- AC-9: perf test gates ×3-5 over budget — failure signals regression, NOT CI blocker for noise

**Estimated test count**: 4-5 new perf tests (~541 → ~545 baseline); 2 new bash lints; 1 CI step; 2 TD register entries

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### Story 003 — Authoring smoke (recommended if FATAL trips during heroes.json iteration)
**Verification method**: Manual `godot --headless --import` + integration test run against partial roster
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer (per `production/qa/smoke-hero-database-story-003-YYYY-MM-DD.md` if generated)
**Evidence to capture**: stderr capture showing zero `push_error` matches; per-record field coverage spot-check

Checklist:
- [ ] `assets/data/heroes/heroes.json` parses cleanly via `JSON.new().parse()` (no parse errors, no warnings)
- [ ] All 26 fields populated per record (no missing, no extras)
- [ ] 4-faction coverage verified (SHU, WEI, WU, QUNXIONG each with ≥1 record)
- [ ] 4-distinct-dominant_stat coverage authoring discipline (Polish lint enforces in story 005 scaffold)
- [ ] Peach Garden Oath bond authored (canonical relationship triangle exercising round-trip path)

### Story 005 — Lint negative-path + CI smoke (REQUIRED — production/qa/smoke-hero-database-story-005-YYYY-MM-DD.md)
**Verification method**: Local bash invocation of both lints + GitHub Actions CI dry-run
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: exit code outputs + screenshots/text of CI step running cleanly + tech-debt-register diff

Checklist:
- [ ] `bash tools/ci/lint_hero_database_no_signal_emission.sh` exits 0 in clean state
- [ ] Negative-path: inject literal `signal test_signal` into `hero_database.gd`, re-run, exit 1; remove, exit 0
- [ ] Negative-path: remove `_heroes_loaded = false` from one test file, re-run, exit 1; restore, exit 0
- [ ] `bash tools/ci/lint_hero_database_validation.sh` exits 0 + prints Polish-deferral message
- [ ] CI step "Lint — HeroDatabase non-emitter + G-15 isolation" runs in `.github/workflows/tests.yml` with exit 0
- [ ] TD-### entries present in `docs/tech-debt-register.md` with reactivation triggers + cross-refs

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for hero-database epic:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (no autoload regression — HeroDatabase is non-autoload but `hero_data.gd` Resource is referenced by future Unit Role consumers)
2. `HeroDatabase._heroes` populates from `assets/data/heroes/heroes.json` on first query call
3. `get_hero(&"shu_001_liu_bei")` (or any canonical roster id) returns full 26-field HeroData
4. Save / load cycle preserves HeroData reference integrity (if save system invokes hero queries — not yet wired in MVP; gate becomes active when SaveManager consumes hero state)
5. No new frame spikes from hero query hot path (perf test in story-005 covers headless; on-device covered by Polish-tier TD entry)
6. All 6 query methods return correctly-typed arrays (G-2 discipline preserved post-WARNING-tier filter in story 004)
7. ≥506 regression baseline maintained — the 1 carried orthogonal failure (`test_hero_data_doc_comment_contains_required_strings`) is acceptable; any NEW failure must be triaged before close-out

*Smoke tests are verified by the developer via `/smoke-check` after story-005 close-out (epic-level smoke).*

---

## Playtest Requirements

*No playtest sessions required for this epic.*

Hero Database is pure Foundation-layer data infrastructure with no player-facing surface. Player perception of hero data quality (balance, narrative resonance, faction identity) is exercised by downstream systems (Battle, Story Event, Character Growth) and validated in their respective epics. The MVP roster authoring quality is a designer-craft concern, not a playtest gate.

---

## Definition of Done — Hero Database Epic

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (4 new test files across 5 stories)
- [ ] For story-005: 2 new bash lints exist in `tools/ci/` + CI step wired in `.github/workflows/tests.yml` + 2 TD entries in `docs/tech-debt-register.md`
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check` after story-005 close-out — epic-level)
- [ ] No regressions introduced beyond the carried orthogonal `test_hero_data_doc_comment_contains_required_strings` failure
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` per-story or convergent at story-005 close-out)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

The EPIC is DONE when (per EPIC.md §Definition of Done):
- All 5 stories Complete
- All 15 TRs verified — 11 via runtime tests, TR-011 via Polish-tier scaffold + TD entry, TR-015 100-hero forward-compat via TD entry
- All 15 GDD ACs verified — AC-01..AC-07 + AC-12..AC-15 via runtime tests; AC-08..AC-11 via Polish-tier scaffold
- `src/foundation/hero_database.gd` shipped (~300 LoC)
- `assets/data/heroes/heroes.json` shipped (8-10 MVP records, 4-faction coverage)
- Full regression ≥506 baseline maintained
- Both lint scripts exit 0 in CI; non-emitter grep + G-15 isolation grep both green
- `forbidden_pattern hero_database_signal_emission` + `hero_data_consumer_mutation` present in `docs/registry/architecture.yaml`
- GDD Status field reads "Accepted via ADR-0007 (2026-04-30)" (same-patch §4 verification — story-001 catches; story-003 safety net)
- 2 TD entries logged for Polish-tier validation lint + 100-hero benchmark
- ADR-0007 §Validation Criteria §1-§9 all green
